title: Invalid done task without completion summary
summary: Done tasks must not omit completion evidence in human-readable form.

lineage.rationale: This fixture exists only to prove the done-task invariant.

evidence.summary: The invalid fixture still carries decision evidence.
The focused test catches the missing completion summary.

audit.notes: Invalid task fixture for completion-summary invariant.

requested_outcome: Demonstrate that done tasks require a completion summary.
acceptance_checks: Validation rejects done tasks without completion summaries.
